item.title: Crossposter Agent
item.description: An AI agent for posting your thoughts to any platform
item.content: An AI agent for posting your thoughts to any platform. Built to automate multi-platform publishing while keeping the workflow lightweight.

item.title: Daily Token
item.description: Daily summary of AI news in the form of a newspaper
item.content: Daily summary of AI news in the form of a newspaper. Built to keep AI updates concise and skimmable, with a focus on consistency and readable delivery.
